bead.title: routing: rebuild RouteStatus and decision evidence from the snapshot
bead.description:
CONTEXT
`RouteStatus` currently groups configured provider defaults rather than the same enriched snapshot rows used by `fiz models` and the target router. SD-005 makes `RouteStatus` part of the debugging contract: if a route candidate lost, operators should be able to explain the loss from `fiz models` plus route decision evidence.

CHANGE
Rebuild `RouteStatus` from the same snapshot-derived candidate inventory used by ResolveRoute. Preserve cooldown, quota, selected endpoint/server instance, sticky lease, last-decision, and routing-quality fields. Enrich route decision evidence with snapshot facts needed for explanations: source freshness/status, auto-routable/exact-pin-only/exclusion reason, endpoint/server instance, catalog power/cost/context, runtime quota/latency, utilization, and typed filter reason.

IN-SCOPE FILES
- service_routestatus.go
- service_routestatus_test.go
- service_events.go / service_events_test.go only if public event evidence fields need expansion
- service_routing.go evidence mapping helpers

OUT-OF-SCOPE
- Score formula changes.
- CLI table styling.
- Provider live integration tests requiring credentials.
bead.acceptance:
1. `go test . -run "TestRouteStatus.*Snapshot|TestRouteStatus.*Cooldown|TestRouteStatus.*LastDecision|TestRoutingDecision.*Evidence" -count=1` passes with a multi-endpoint fixture proving RouteStatus candidates match snapshot rows.
2. `go test ./agentcli -run "TestCLI_RouteStatus|TestCLI_ListModels" -count=1` passes or the nearest existing route-status/list-models CLI tests pass.
3. A test asserts every rejected RouteDecision candidate has a typed FilterReason and enough snapshot identity to match a `fiz models --json` row by provider/model/endpoint/server_instance.
